subtitle.ja: 小さな輪を作り、両手の人差し指を向こう側から入れます。元の輪に両手の親指を手前側から入れて輪を広げます。手のひらを上に向けます
subtitle.en: Make a small loop and insert both index fingers from the far side. Insert both thumbs from the near side into the original loop and spread it. Turn the palms upward.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指手前側の糸を超えて人差し指向こう側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, move over the near index-finger strings and pick up the far index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指で、親指向こう側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both middle fingers, pick up the far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の薬指で、中指手前側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both ring fingers, pick up the near middle-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指で、薬指手前側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, pick up the near ring-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指から全ての糸を静かに離し、親指を小指手前の糸の上に乗せます
subtitle.en: Release all the strings from both thumbs, and move the thumbs over the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 指先を向こう側に向けて素早く倒しながら、左右の親指を引き下げて完成です
subtitle.en: Tilt the fingertips quickly away and pull the thumbs downward to complete the figure.
